
### exercise: throughput/latency (1)  {.smaller}

![](/pipeline/texfig/throughLat-exercise-throughputlatency-1.figure.svg)
 

* suppose cycle time is 500 ps
* exercise: latency of one instruction? <div class="my-small"><table>
   <tr><td>A. 100 ps</td><td>B. 500 ps</td><td>C. 2000 ps</td><td>D. 2500 ps</td><td>E. something else</td></tr>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>
   </div>

* exercise: throughput overall? <div class="my-small"><table>
   <tr><td>A. 1 instr/100 ps</td><td>B. 1 instr/500 ps</td><td>C. 1 instr/2000ps</td><td>D. 1 instr/2500 ps</td></tr>
<tr><td>E. something else</td></tr>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>
   </div>



### exercise: throughput/latency (2)  {.smaller}

![](/pipeline/texfig/throughLat-exercise-throughputlatency-2.figure.svg)
 
 

* double number of pipeline stages (to 10) + decrease cycle time from 500 ps to 250 ps --- throughput? <div class="my-small"><table>
   <tr><td>A. 1 instr/100 ps</td><td>B. 1 instr/250 ps</td><td>C. 1 instr/1000ps</td><td>D. 1 instr/5000 ps</td></tr>
<tr><td>E. something else</td></tr>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>
   </div>
